ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user registered */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who created the post */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption associated with the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the post was created */,
  "no_of_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., photo, video, story) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each like event */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* Reference to the post that is liked */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who liked the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the like was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* Reference to the post related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who owns these settings */,
  "privacy_level" TEXT /* Privacy level of the user (e.g., public, private) */,
  "notifications_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if notifications are enabled */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if email notifications are enabled */,
  "push_notifications" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if push notifications are enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* Reference to the post associated with the image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., photo, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* Reference to the post associated with the comment */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follows" (
  "follow_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each follow relationship */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who is following */,
  "followed_user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user being followed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the follow relationship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_followed_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("followed_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each block relationship */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who blocked */,
  "blocked_user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user being blocked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the block relationship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_blocked_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("blocked_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
